verdicts.rationale: lines 152967-152989: INITIALIZATION calls PERFORM adjust_toolbar USING '1001' (strips toolbar, see adjust_toolbar 152933-152960) and lcl_password_dialog=>on_screen_init( ); START-OF-SELECTION contains only PERFORM run. No classic list output events present.

lines 152807-152817: TRY checks zcl_abapgit_auth=>is_allowed( ...startup ) = abap_false then raises, then zcl_abapgit_migrations=>run( ), then PERFORM open_gui; CATCH zcx_abapgit_exception and zcx_abapgit_not_found both MESSAGE ... TYPE 'E'. Exact order and handling as asserted.

lines 152827-152844: IF sy-batch = abap_true -> zcl_abapgit_background=>run( ); ELSE GET PARAMETER ID 'DBT' FIELD lv_mode (SPA/GPA), CASE derives lv_action, zcl_abapgit_ui_factory=>get_gui( )->go_home( lv_action ), CALL SELECTION-SCREEN 1001. Matches.
line 7264 CONSTANTS c_abap_version TYPE string VALUE '1.133.0' sits inside INTERFACE zif_abapgit_version (declared at 7261, ENDINTERFACE 7266). Version and enclosing interface both confirmed.

marker proven at 152991-152996: INTERFACE lif_abapmerge_marker with c_abapmerge_version VALUE `0.16.8` at the very end. DEFERRED-at-top part independently verified at lines 29-40+ (INTERFACE zif_abapgit_version DEFERRED, zif_abapgit_definitions DEFERRED, ...). All parts of the pattern claim hold.

lines 152376-152378: SCREEN 1001 empty (BEGIN/END, only comment 'dummy for triggering screen on Java SAP GUI'); 152389-152409 SCREEN 1002 TITLE sc_title with p_url/p_user/p_pass/p_cmnt = login/password popup. Both screens as asserted.
PARAMETERS statements in SCREEN 1002 range 152389-152409: p_url (152393), p_user (152398), p_pass (152402), p_cmnt (152407) = exactly 4.

METHOD popup of lcl_password_dialog (decl 152424-152429: CLASS-METHODS popup ... CHANGING cv_user cv_pass). Lines 152469-152476: IF gv_confirm = abap_true cv_user=p_user, cv_pass=p_pass; ELSE CLEAR cv_user,cv_pass; then CLEAR p_url,p_user,p_pass. Matches exactly.

line 20873 CONSTANTS c_tabname VALUE 'ZABAPGIT'; lines 73253 MODIFY (c_tabname) FROM ls_content and 73261 SELECT SINGLE data_str FROM (c_tabname). Dynamic access to the custom persistence table confirmed.

All 5 named accesses verified: SELECT * FROM tadir (92651), SELECT DISTINCT ... FROM e071 (72472-72474), SELECT SINGLE as4user FROM e070 (84503), SELECT SINGLE progname FROM reposrc (74899), SELECT SINGLE tabname FROM dd02l (74072). Every asserted SELECT form matches the source.

FORM adjust_toolbar 152904+: CALL FUNCTION 'RPY_DYNPRO_READ' (152912) then IF sy-subrc IS NOT INITIAL RETURN; sets ls_header-no_toolbar (152940) and CALL FUNCTION 'RPY_DYNPRO_INSERT' (152942); errors ignored via RETURN (152961-152962). Matches.

FORM output 152850-152876: APPEND 'CRET' and 'SPOS' to lt_ucomm, CALL FUNCTION 'RS_SET_SELSCREEN_STATUS' with p_exclude = lt_ucomm; then IF is_variant_maintenance( ) = abap_false -> get_gui( )->set_focus( ). Exclusions and focus-unless-variant logic confirmed.

The example 'wildcard SELECT * FROM tadir over SICF' is proven at 92651-92655 (WHERE object='SICF', obj_name LIKE). But 'the report shell performs no mass-data extraction' and 'the dominant DB cost is...' are qualitative/comparative inferences not provable from the cited lines (which are in an object handler, not the report shell).

marker interface at line 152991-152996 (near file end, so ~153k lines) with c_abapmerge_version `0.16.8`. The generated-monolith nature is directly shown by the abapmerge marker; the maintain-upstream implication follows from it.

lines 92651-92655: SELECT * FROM tadir INTO CORRESPONDING FIELDS OF TABLE lt_tadir, obj_name LIKE lv_obj_name, no UP TO n ROWS, and pragmas ##TOO_MANY_ITAB_FIELDS plus "#EC CI_GENBUFF on the same statement. Every element of the bug claim is on the cited lines.

METHOD get_package_from_adt (decl 152744): the entire dynamic ADT access is wrapped in TRY (152761) ... CATCH cx_root ##NO_HANDLER (152792) with comment 'ignore it ... fail silently'. rv_package is set only inside TRY (152781), so on any error it stays initial. Matches.

FORM exit 152878-152902: IF sy-dynnr <> 1001 RETURN (restricts to main screen); CASE sy-ucomm WHEN 'CBAC' OR 'CCAN' -> IF get_gui( )->back( iv_graceful = abap_true ) = abap_true THEN free( ) (end of stack) ELSE LEAVE TO SCREEN 1001. Matches.

FORM password_popup (152559) has CHANGING cv_user cv_pass and delegates to lcl_password_dialog=>popup passing cv_user (152570). Inside popup (152469-152473): cv_user = p_user only when gv_confirm = abap_true, else CLEAR cv_user; p_url/p_user/p_pass cleared at 152476. P_USER -> cv_user CHANGING -> caller flow proven; routine attribution correct.

cv_pass = p_pass on confirm (152471), CLEAR p_pass at 152476, cv_pass is CHANGING of FORM password_popup (152563) delegated to popup (152571). screen-invisible='1' on P_PASS confirmed at 152506-152508 (on_screen_output LOOP AT SCREEN). All cited sub-facts verified.
